title: Gifts Under $25
description: Thoughtful holiday gifts that won't break the bank — each one chosen for warmth, charm, and staying power.

products.name: Beeswax Candle Gift Set
products.description: Hand-rolled beeswax tapers with a warm honey scent. Burns clean for 8+ hours each.

products.name: Artisan Hot Cocoa Collection
products.description: Four single-origin drinking chocolates in a keepsake tin. From dark Peruvian to spiced Mexican.

products.name: Wool Blend Reading Socks
products.description: Knee-high cable-knit socks in heathered cranberry. Warm enough for the coldest reading nook.

title: Gifts for Grandparents
description: Heirloom-worthy presents for the people who taught you what traditions mean.

products.name: Personalized Family Recipe Book
products.description: A linen-bound blank recipe journal with family tree pages and space for 80+ recipes.

products.name: Cashmere-Blend Throw Blanket
products.description: Lightweight yet impossibly warm. The kind of blanket that becomes someone's favorite.

products.name: Vintage-Style Photo Frame Set
products.description: Set of three distressed wood frames. Fits 4x6, 5x7, and 8x10 prints.

title: The Cozy Night In
description: Everything needed for a perfect winter evening — blankets, cocoa, candles, and something to read.
imageAlt: Cozy reading nook with blanket, candles, and hot drink

products.name: Hygge Candle Trio
products.description: Cedar, vanilla, and cinnamon bark. Poured in small batches with cotton wicks.

products.name: Classic Christmas Stories Anthology
products.description: A clothbound collection of Dickens, O. Henry, and lesser-known gems. Gold-foil spine.

products.name: Merino Wool Lap Blanket
products.description: Compact enough for the sofa, warm enough for the porch. Ethically sourced New Zealand merino.

title: Gifts for the Baker
description: For the one who fills the house with the scent of cinnamon and butter every December.

products.name: Copper Cookie Cutter Collection

products.name: Marble Rolling Pin
